title: fvs-modern: Modernized Forest Vegetation Simulator with Bayesian Calibration
description: A modernized fork of the USDA Forest Vegetation Simulator (FVS) featuring Fortran 77 to Fortran 90 source conversion, Bayesian hierarchical calibration of growth and mortality equations using FIA remeasurement data, uncertainty quantification through posterior predictive intervals, and National Standard Base Equations (NSBE/VTECO) for volume and biomass estimation. Covers all 25 FVS geographic variants across the United States and Canada.

creators.name: Weiskittel, Aaron R.
creators.affiliation: Center for Research on Sustainable Forests, University of Maine
